Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Horizon Pool Service to get the job done right.

“After three companies failed to keep our Wynwood pool clear during mango season, Horizon solved it with custom filter cycles and enzyme treatments. Two years without a single algae bloom despite all the organic debris from our trees.”

Mariana C. Weekly Maintenance
Mar 15, 2025

“Our original 1998 pump died during July heat. Horizon had it rebuilt with upgraded seals within 24 hours while every big-box store quoted 3-week waits for replacements. Technician explained how to extend the new motor's life in salt air.”

James T. Equipment Repair
Jan 22, 2025

“The waterline on our Biscayne Point home looked permanently ruined until Horizon's treatment restored the original glass tile. They even matched a missing piece from the 1960s installation using their vendor network.”

Lisa P. Salt Deposit Removal
Nov 30, 2024

“Best investment for our snowbird lifestyle. The system texts me when chemical levels need attention or when heavy rain requires adjustment. Horizon programmed it to prepare automatically for our monthly absences.”

Carlos R. Smart Pool Upgrades
Oct 18, 2024

“Saved us $15k in unnecessary deck repairs. What we thought was a plumbing leak turned out to be groundwater infiltration during king tides. Their detailed report helped our insurance claim for the structural remediation.”

Sophia K. Leak Diagnosis
Sep 5, 2024

“As a Coral Gables historic board member, I appreciate how Horizon maintains our 1926 pool without compromising authenticity. They source period-appropriate replacement parts and use gentle methods on the original terrazzo.”

Thomas V. Weekly Maintenance
Aug 12, 2024
Horizon Pool Service

Trusted pool service professionals serving Miami, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
